## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] I have signed the CLA (the bot will prompt on your first PR)
- [ ] Tests added or updated for new behavior
- [ ] `bin/rails test` passes locally
- [ ] `bin/rubocop` passes locally
- [ ] `bin/brakeman` passes locally (for changes touching auth, controllers, or background jobs)
- [ ] Documentation updated if behavior or public APIs changed
- [ ] My changes fit the project scope (OSS vs. hosted SaaS — see CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] No third-party code is included without a compatible license and attribution
